gate_role: E0 prerequisite only; qualification permits the bounded H0-E-v2 parent-occurrence E1 pilot but does not qualify H0-E or authorize H1a

source.origin: PyXtal packaged maximal translationengleiche/klassengleiche subgroup and Wyckoff-splitting tables derived from crystallographic tables

scope.maximal_klassengleiche_edges: all packaged records with subgroup index <= 4

representation.affine_embedding: exact rational 3x4 numerator plus one common denominator
representation.wyckoff_child_orbit_order: physically unordered within each splitting relation
representation.duplicate_source_rows: aggregated as provenance multiplicity and forbidden from changing candidate measure
representation.runtime_dependency: none; PyXtal is an offline source/compiler dependency only
representation.affine_inclusion_check: vectorized T H T^-1 subset G modulo integer translations
representation.future_occurrence_action: frozen site permutation/lift plus Cartesian 3x3 and Kelvin-6D actions; dense 3N by 3N forbidden

advancement_rule: E0 passes only if every frozen check and the independent audit pass. E0 failure stops H0-E-v2 E1 and all H1+ work. E0 success permits only the bounded parent-occurrence E1 implementation/pilot.
